criteria.label: Define TPR, FPR, and state what the ROC curve plots.
criteria.example: Write TPR = TP/(TP+FN), FPR = FP/(FP+TN), and sketch axes: FPR horizontal, TPR vertical, one point per threshold.

criteria.label: Explain AUC as a ranking probability and interpret 0.5 vs 1.0.
criteria.example: State AUC = P(score_pos > score_neg); 0.5 = random order; 1.0 = all positives strictly above all negatives on the validation set.

criteria.label: Compute ROC-AUC on a holdout set with scikit-learn.
criteria.example: Fit LogisticRegression on train; report roc_auc_score(y_test, predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]) and print first three (fpr, tpr) pairs from roc_curve.

criteria.label: Choose a deployment threshold from roc_curve given a TPR constraint.
criteria.example: From roc_curve output, pick the threshold with TPR ≥ 0.85 and minimum FPR; report threshold, TPR, FPR, and argue why AUC alone was insufficient.
